mapper.select: SELECT fi.id, k3_id, supplier_number, ANY_VALUE(cy.name_zh) AS nation, bank_account, account_name, receiving_bank, bank_address, opening_bank, created_at, updated_at FROM financial_information fi LEFT JOIN country cy ON fi.nation = cy.id WHERE supplier_number = #{supplierNumber}

SELECT id, k3_id, supplier_number, nation, bank_account, account_name, receiving_bank, bank_address, opening_bank, created_at, updated_at FROM financial_information WHERE supplier_number = #{supplierNumber}

SELECT id, k3_id, supplier_number, nation, bank_account, account_name, receiving_bank, bank_address, opening_bank, created_at, updated_at FROM financial_information WHERE supplier_number IN
#{item}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO financial_information ( k3_id, supplier_number, nation, bank_account, account_name, receiving_bank, bank_address, opening_bank, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{k3Id}, #{supplierNumber}, #{nation}, #{bankAccount}, #{accountName}, #{receivingBank}, #{bankAddress}, #{openingBank}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE financial_information
nation = #{contactBase.nation},
bank_account = #{contactBase.bankAccount},
account_name = #{contactBase.accountName},
receiving_bank = #{contactBase.receivingBank},
bank_address = #{contactBase.bankAddress},
opening_bank = #{contactBase.openingBank},
WHERE id = #{contactBase.id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, k3_id, supplier_number, nation, bank_account, account_name, receiving_bank, bank_address, opening_bank, created_at, updated_at FROM financial_information WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, k3_id, supplier_number, nation, bank_account, account_name, receiving_bank, bank_address, opening_bank, created_at, updated_at FROM financial_information
${ew.sqlSegment}
SELECT supplier_number FROM financial_information WHERE supplier_number IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO financial_information ( supplier_number, nation, bank_account, account_name, receiving_bank, bank_address, opening_bank, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.supplierNumber}, #{item.nation}, #{item.bankAccount}, #{item.accountName}, #{item.receivingBank}, #{item.bankAddress}, #{item.openingBank}, NOW(), NOW() )
